_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in drafting serialized reports to the quality level meeting release standards.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.542), RC-T-004 (RC, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.424). Shared vocabulary: [level, skill]. DCWF-only terms [drafting, meeting, quality, release, reports, serialized] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, milestone, producing, program] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.883, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in drafting serialized reports to the quality level meeting release standa" and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.589 > STS 0.424 (gap +0.165). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [level, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [level, skill]. DCWF-only: [drafting, meeting, quality, release, reports, serialized]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, milestone, producing, program].

signals.detail: STS 0.424 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.165 with low STS 0.424. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
